name: Strawberry Tart
recipeIngredient: 1 pkg sugar-free vanilla instant pudding mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Use an 8- or 9-inch tart pan with removable bottom. Firmly pat the graham cracker pie shell into the pan. Set aside.
2. In a deep bowl, blend the milk with the instant pudding mix using a whisk or electric mixer. Continue mixing at low speed for 1 minute or until the pudding is dissolved.
3. Add the grated orange rind. Let stand for 5 minutes and pour into the pie shell. Let set for 15 minutes or until firm.
4. Arrange strawberries or other berries decoratively over the pudding shortly before serving.
Ford Exchanges per serving: 1 STARCH EXCHANGE + 1 FAT EXCHANGE; CAL: 134; CHO: 18g; PRO: 3g; FAT: 5g; SOD: 320mg; CHO: 1mg; LOW-SODIUM DIET. This recipe is suitable for occasional use. Use unsalted margarine in the pie shell.
